mapper.select:
SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM, --SUBSCRIBER_NO, SUB_LINK_NAME, SOC, (SELECT RATE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = SOC AND ROWNUM = 1) SERVICE_NM, SUB_STATUS, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER', 'SUB_STATUS', SUB_STATUS) SUB_STATUS_NM, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, DECODE(SUB_STATUS, 'A', '', 'S', TO_CHAR(STATUS_STOP_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_CHAR(STATUS_CANCEL_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) SUB_STATUS_DATE, TO_NUMBER(DECODE(B.SUB_STATUS,'A', CEIL(SYSDATE - TO_DATE(B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD')),'S', CEIL(C.STATUS_STOP_DT - TO_DATE(B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD')),'C', CEIL(C.STATUS_CANCEL_DT - TO_DATE(B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD')), '')) USE_TERM, VOICE_CNT, TRUNC(VOICE_DUR/60, 2) VOICE_DUR, SMS_CNT, MMS_CNT, TOT_SMS_MAX, TOT_SMS, CASE WHEN TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') < TO_DATE(LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') THEN TRUNC(TOT_SMS / (TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - TO_DATE(LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD')) +1) ELSE TRUNC(TOT_SMS / ((TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYYMMDD')) +1)) END SMS_CNT_DAY, F_GET_AGENT_NM(AGENT_ID) AGENT_NM, F_GET_AGENT_NM(AGENT_SALE_ID) AGENT_SALE_NM, (SELECT 'Y' FROM PPS_CUSTOMER_WAR WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND DEL_YN = 'N' AND ROWNUM = 1) WAR_FLAG FROM ( SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(A PPS_STATS_CDR_WAR_PK) */ CONTRACT_NUM, SUM(SMS_CNT) SMS_CNT, SUM(MMS_CNT) MMS_CNT, SUM(TOT_SMS) TOT_SMS, SUM(VOICE_CNT) VOICE_CNT, SUM(VOICE_DUR) VOICE_DUR, MAX(TOT_SMS) TOT_SMS_MAX FROM PPS_STATS_CDR_WAR WHERE 1=1
AND STAT_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND STAT_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')+1
GROUP BY CONTRACT_NUM ) A, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B, PPS_CUSTOMER C WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM
AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{searchNm}
AND B.SUBSCRIBER_NO LIKE '%' || #{searchNm} || '%'
AND B.SUB_LINK_NAME LIKE '%' || #{searchNm} || '%'
AND B.USER_SSN = CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(#{searchNm})
AND TOT_SMS >= TO_NUMBER(#{searchSmsCnt})
AND C.SOC = #{searchFeatures}
AND B.SUB_STATUS IN ('A', 'S')
AND B.SUB_STATUS = #{searchSubStatus}
AND A.CONTRACT_NUM IN (SELECT CONTRACT_NUM FROM PPS_CUSTOMER_WAR WHERE DEL_YN = 'N')
AND A.CONTRACT_NUM NOT IN (SELECT CONTRACT_NUM FROM PPS_CUSTOMER_WAR WHERE DEL_YN = 'N')

SELECT NVL(A.CONTRACT_NUM, '-') CONTRACT_NUM, --NVL(SUBSCRIBER_NO, '-') SUBSCRIBER_NO, NVL(SUB_LINK_NAME, '-') SUB_LINK_NAME, NVL(SOC, '-') SOC, NVL((SELECT RATE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = SOC AND ROWNUM = 1), '-') SERVICE_NM, NVL(SUB_STATUS, '-') SUB_STATUS, NVL(F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER', 'SUB_STATUS', SUB_STATUS), '-') SUB_STATUS_NM, NVL(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD'), '-') LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, NVL(DECODE(SUB_STATUS, 'A', '', 'S', TO_CHAR(STATUS_STOP_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_CHAR(STATUS_CANCEL_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD')), '-') SUB_STATUS_DATE, NVL(TO_NUMBER(DECODE(B.SUB_STATUS,'A', CEIL(SYSDATE - TO_DATE(B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD')),'S', CEIL(C.STATUS_STOP_DT - TO_DATE(B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD')),'C', CEIL(C.STATUS_CANCEL_DT - TO_DATE(B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD')), '')), 0) USE_TERM, NVL(VOICE_CNT, 0) VOICE_CNT, NVL(TRUNC(VOICE_DUR/60, 2), 0) VOICE_DUR, NVL(SMS_CNT, 0) SMS_CNT, NVL(MMS_CNT, 0) MMS_CNT, NVL(TOT_SMS_MAX, 0) TOT_SMS_MAX, NVL(CASE WHEN TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') < TO_DATE(LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') THEN TRUNC(TOT_SMS / (TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - TO_DATE(LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD')) +1) ELSE TRUNC(TOT_SMS / ((TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYYMMDD')) +1)) END, 0) SMS_CNT_DAY, NVL(TOT_SMS, 0) TOT_SMS, NVL(F_GET_AGENT_NM(AGENT_ID), '-') AGENT_NM, NVL(F_GET_AGENT_NM(AGENT_SALE_ID), '-') AGENT_SALE_NM, NVL((SELECT 'Y' FROM PPS_CUSTOMER_WAR WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND DEL_YN = 'N' AND ROWNUM = 1), '-') WAR_FLAG FROM ( SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(A PPS_STATS_CDR_WAR_PK) */ CONTRACT_NUM, SUM(SMS_CNT) SMS_CNT, SUM(MMS_CNT) MMS_CNT, SUM(TOT_SMS) TOT_SMS, SUM(VOICE_CNT) VOICE_CNT, SUM(VOICE_DUR) VOICE_DUR, MAX(TOT_SMS) TOT_SMS_MAX FROM PPS_STATS_CDR_WAR WHERE 1=1
AND STAT_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND STAT_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')+1
GROUP BY CONTRACT_NUM ) A, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B, PPS_CUSTOMER C WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM
AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{searchNm}
AND B.SUBSCRIBER_NO LIKE '%' || #{searchNm} || '%'
AND B.SUB_LINK_NAME LIKE '%' || #{searchNm} || '%'
AND B.USER_SSN = CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(#{searchNm})
AND TOT_SMS >= TO_NUMBER(#{searchSmsCnt})
AND C.SOC = #{searchFeatures}
AND B.SUB_STATUS IN ('A', 'S')
AND B.SUB_STATUS = #{searchSubStatus}
AND A.CONTRACT_NUM IN (SELECT CONTRACT_NUM FROM PPS_CUSTOMER_WAR WHERE DEL_YN = 'N')
AND A.CONTRACT_NUM NOT IN (SELECT CONTRACT_NUM FROM PPS_CUSTOMER_WAR WHERE DEL_YN = 'N')
